title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Mindspace Business Parks REIT

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Mindspace Business Parks REIT
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? Mindspace Business Parks REIT in Bengaluru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Mindspace Business Parks REIT:
Mindspace Business Parks REIT is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mindspace Business Parks REIT!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
